subject: Super Saiyan child warrior screaming mid-power-up, golden aura erupting, orange gi
description: A small child figure in an orange gi is screaming with mouth wide open, body tensed in a full power-up pose. Bright golden energy radiates outward in all directions creating a star-burst aura. The hair is spiky and appears to stand on end in the Super Saiyan transformation style. The background is consumed by blinding golden-white light. The expression conveys overwhelming exertion and raw power being unleashed.
foreground: Child figure in orange gi, screaming, golden aura exploding outward
background: Blinding golden-white energy burst, no distinct environment visible
emotion: screaming in exertion, raw power release, overwhelming intensity
